raw_consumer_statement:
Best Buy Fraudulent Purchase Statement XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, TX XXXX XXXX XXXX On XX/XX/XXXXXXXX I received an email alert from Best Buy that an order was ready for pickup. I called Best Buy and successfully canceled the order and disputed the claim ( XXXX ). The Best Buy Primary Account Team ( XXXX ) explained an alert / flag would be placed on the account and escalated the dispute to the fraud team, ( Case ID : XXXX ). After everything is submitted to the fraud department it would be 24-48hrs. However, I found out an order for a laptop was picked up on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX. XXXXand another laptop was picked up on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX. XXXX by an individual listed as family & friends XXXX XXXX on the order pickup. Both orders list my name as the customer with my phone number, email and an incorrect address. I XXXX the address, its a valid address, just not mine. ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, TX XXXX ). The XXXX  used ended in XXXX is not my XXXX and it is a different XXXX number than my Best Buy credit card. It was an online dot com purchase, with pickup at Best Buy at XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, TX XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I went to Best Buy, spoke with the manager ( XXXX ) who hands me a card explaining XXXX requests for camera footage needs to come from XXXX/Best Buy law enforcement support team. Email : XXXX. XXXX XX/XX/XXXX another XXXX  ending in XXXX Exp XX/XX/XXXX ( address : XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX TX XXXX XXXX was added and saved as a payment method in my Best Buy Account. I deleted both XXXX from the payment methods and deleted XXXX XXXX under family & friends. 
I called and spoke to XXXX and filed a fraud complaint with XXXX XXXX # XXXX, who explained itll be forwarded to XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX. Case No. XXXX. I did freeze my credit with the three bureaus and reported identity theft to federal trade commission via XXXX
